items.title: Billionaire Les Wexner tells US lawmakers he was 'naive' and 'conned' by Epstein
items.description: Testifying before Congress, the former CEO of Victoria's Secret lingerie brand accused Epstein of stealing "vast sums" of money from his family.

items.title: Samba school that praised Brazil's Lula  at Rio Carnival relegated
items.description: See the floats from the famous festival as the city's top samba schools compete for first prize.

items.title: Giant robot tribute to Brazil's President Lula comes last in carnival competition
items.description: Rio de Janeiro's iconic Carnival parades began with a tribute to Brazil's President Lula, illustrating his rise from poverty to power.

items.title: South Korea's ex-president jailed for life over martial law attempt
items.description: Yoon Suk Yeol's December 2024 martial law bid fundamentally damaged South Korea's democracy, a judge told the court.

items.title: Do not give away Diego Garcia, Trump tells UK in fresh attack on Chagos deal
items.description: The president's comments come just a day after the US gave its official backing to the UK's Chagos deal.
